author: Annon.
body: Found this post searching for lyrics (which are impossible to find, by the way). Couldn’t agree more with you though — fantastic album.

author: Burgo
body:
Hi Annon,  
Glad the search – even though it wasn’t your final target – brought you by! If you like Frightened Rabbit, you might like some of the other tunes I feature on this blog, so hopefully you’ll come by again sometime :)

author: Doggles
body:
Good review matey – I’ll be bookmarking your site.

I’ve had “Heads Roll Off” on repeatedly at window-cracking, ears-bleeding volume since I found out about this band on Monday. It makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Music that’s worth being alive to hear.

author: Burgo
body:
Hi Doggles,  
Thanks for stopping by… that’s probably one of the best ways I’ve heard the music described :)
